name: Turkey and Rice Quiche
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked rice, cooled to room Temp
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, turkey, tomato, onions, green pepper, basil, salt, red pepper, milk, and eggs in 13x9x2" pan coated with cooking spray. Top with cheeses.
2. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until knife inserted near center comes out clean. To serve, cut quiche into 8 squares, cut each square diagonally into 2 triangles.
